injuries.comment: The Kings said that Kuemper skated on Saturday and might travel with the Kings for their upcoming five-game road trip, which begins on Tuesday (Oct. 21) versus the Blues, per Zach Dooley of LA Kings.
The Kings said on Friday (Oct. 17) that Kopitar is listed as week-to-week with a foot injury.
The Hurricanes said that Slavin is OUT for Tuesday's (Oct. 14) game versus the Sharks and is out indefinitely, per Walt Ruff of the team's official site.
